0.text: Atelectasis in the lingular segment of the left lung

1.text: Atelectasis in the middle lobe of the right lung

2.text: Subsegmental atelectasis in the lower lobes of both lungs

3.text: Areas of infiltration in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

4.text: Areas of infiltration in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

5.text: Areas of infiltration in the laterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

6.text: Ground-glass opacity in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

7.text: Ground-glass opacity in the posterobasal segment of the left lower lobe

8.text: Ground-glass opacity in the laterobasal segment of the right lower lobe
